creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
I'm trying to build with gcc-4.8 on ia64.
I now get python errors:

http://eis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/aster-10.8-ia64-gcc48-build.log

compilation of elements with /usr/ports/french/aster/work/aster-full-src-10.8.0/instdir/STA10.8/asteru
                                                                        [FAILED]
Exit code : 4

 Version s?quentielle de Code_aster 
==========================================
==========================================

# COMPILATION DU CATALOGUE D'ELEMENT
DEBUT ( CATALOGUE = _F( FICHIER = 'CATAELEM' , UNITE = 4 ))
MAJ_CATA ( ELEMENT = _F())
FIN()

==========================================
==========================================

 To re-run compilation manually :
 cd /tmp/root-mech-cluster241-build.78266
  ./asteru Python/Execution/E_SUPERV.py -eficas_path ./Python -commandes fort.1 -memjeveux 64 -tpmax 120

<F>_CATAELE_ERROR  error during compilation of elements


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
<F> errors previously raised :
 


<F>_CATAELE_ERROR  error during compilation of elements


<F>_BUILD_FAILED   Exception raised by MakeAster:
------------------------------------------------------------
Traceback:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/ports/french/aster/work/aster-full-src-10.8.0/instdir/asrun/maintenance.py", line 775, in MakeAster
    _build_aster(run, conf, False, REPREF, run.get('destdir'), reptrav)
  File "/usr/ports/french/aster/work/aster-full-src-10.8.0/instdir/asrun/maintenance.py", line 993, in _build_aster
    kret = build.CompilEle(REPREF, reptrav, **kargs)
  File "/usr/ports/french/aster/work/aster-full-src-10.8.0/instdir/asrun/build.py", line 1073, in CompilEle
    '<F>_CATAELE_ERROR')
  File "/usr/ports/french/aster/work/aster-full-src-10.8.0/instdir/asrun/build.py", line 157, in _mess
    self.run.Mess(msg, cod, store)
  File "/usr/ports/french/aster/work/aster-full-src-10.8.0/instdir/asrun/run.py", line 668, in Mess
    self.Sortie(4)
  File "/usr/ports/french/aster/work/aster-full-src-10.8.0/instdir/asrun/run.py", line 708, in Sortie
    raise RunAsterError, exit_code
RunAsterError: 4

------------------------------------------------------------
Exit code : 4


Do you know what's going on?

Do I have to rebuild python with gcc-4.8 as well?

Thanks

Anton
